message:
fix: eliminate deadlock in TestRestartWithBackoff_SkipsIfStartedDuringSleep (gt-m5ju2)

The test used time.Sleep(5ms) to race against restartWithBackoff sleep,
relying on precise OS scheduling. When the goroutine woke first, it
re-acquired m.mu and entered real startLocked() which sleeps 500ms.
The test goroutine blocked on m.mu.Lock() forever since the spawned
goroutine held the lock through startLocked, exited without unlocking.

Fix: rewrite using test hook infrastructure (newTestManager, sleepFn,
runningFn, startFn) with channel-based synchronization. Deterministic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
